  "analysis": "The user wants to compare wireless headphones under ₹2000 from Flipkart and Amazon and add the cheapest one with the highest rating to the cart. I have already searched on Flipkart and Amazon. I have extracted the top 3 results from both sites.

2. boAt Rockerz 450: Price ₹1,499, Rating 4.3
3. boAt Rockerz 450 Pro: Price ₹1,599, Rating 4.3
